package.name: auv_navigation
package.description: AUV kinematic navigation with an Extended Kalman filter: same sensor/topic contract as auv_navigation (Imu, dvl_msgs/DVL, DVLDR, optional JointState encoders, Float32 depth, sensor_msgs/Range altimeter). Filter core uses numerically stable updates (solve-based gain, Joseph covariance), optional Mahalanobis gating, and Jacobians built with central differences / compact analytic blocks instead of the reference EKF hand-derived matrices.
